stemHtml: If, in flight, the needle and ball of turn and slip indicator are on the left, the aircraft is…

options.a: turning left with not enough left rudder deflection for a coordinated turn.
options.b: turning right with not enough left rudder deflection for a coordinated turn.
options.c: turning left with too much left rudder deflection for a coordinated turn.
options.d: turning right with too much left rudder deflection for a coordinated turn.
